questionHtml:
The dog food is sold in closed cylindrical containers, with radius r and height h.

The whole container is made from one type of material, and it is assumed that the thickness of the material is negligible.

Each container has a volume of 400 cm3.

Write down the integral that represents the area of the shaded region.
markschemeHtml:
∫05-x33+3x2-7x+6 dx          A2

 

Note: Award A2 for an integral with correct integrand and correct limits.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Write down the integral that represents the area of the shaded region.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 5.5—Integration introduction, areas between curve and x axis
